entry.title: Pihole
entry.summary: Green (easiest): install Pi-hole on a raspberry pi running raspbian Installation of Raspbian/Raspberry Pi OS: If you have access to a monitor or TV, you can use the SD card in your CanaKit, since that comes pre-loaded and is easy to install per these instructions in the “booting from NOOBS” section. If you don’t have access to a monitor, or don’t want to use one, you can download a Raspberry...
